title: Glaiden's Audio
description: Mod that adds a bunch of stuff from boombox to radio transmitter with your custom audio.
body:
This mod aims to add all you need for role play and survival in the field of radio transmissions and audio playing.

![all mod items rn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e999be1597fac2273eff3c45abcb82a8506b9a.png)

Mod adds radio transmitter,2 types of recievers and towers, boombox, dyable cassetes with, redstone dynamic and all of that with your custom music! 

![Cassetes can be dyed to any color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f135ab9aed0f284e02fdd2e4f9e18262164d120b.png)

Mod supports **Youtube links**, **Soundcloud** and **straight links to mp3** and even uploading **mp3 files directly** from your computer!
**Sound Physics Remastered** Campatable!
Create Aeronautics support is available separate mod.

![Station GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af8c5bc3c1e06d20db81c810e7ad04029b07671a.png)

This mod features realistic radio system that aims to make radio broadcasting very interesting and authentic, for example, to broadcast your music you need to build web of radio towers, and further you are from a tower, more interference you hear, untill sound is unrecognizable, also your positions height and weather affects sound quality.


**[Join our discord server!](https://discord.gg/4hBpB59qS6)**
